subject: Damaged Stock Report - RAW-001
body: Hi team, during this morning's pallet inspection, we found a severe roof leak over aisle 4. Unfortunately, 50 units of RAW-001 have been completely ruined by water damage and are unusable. We have disposed of them. Please adjust the system inventory to reflect this loss and account for a $500 write-off.

subject: VIP Rush Request: SKU-A
body: Our Tier-1 VIP customer just called. They desperately need an extra 200 units of SKU-A shipped by next Tuesday. Do we have enough raw materials (RAW-1 and RAW-2) in stock to squeeze this into the manufacturing schedule? Let me know ASAP so I can confirm the sale with them.
